milestone: V804 Boundary Manufacturing Source Path Support
scope: Adds explicit and fallback TIGER/Line source shapefile path resolution to the county boundary manufacturing script without changing boundary geometry, promotion tooling, or V802/V803 validation behavior.

sourcePathSupport.fallbackBehavior: When -SourceShapefile is omitted, the script first attempts the existing repository-relative default path and only falls back to the canonical Gridly-Source-Data path if the default is absent and the fallback exists.

validation.purpose: Confirm V803 interpolation safety remains intact after adding source path handling.
Confirm existing Jefferson V802 manufactured boundary package remains valid after source path support changes.
Required local manufacturing command for Windows canonical source path; not executed in this Linux container because PowerShell and the Windows C:\ source tree are unavailable here.
